original_image_tags: faded, ghostly text visible through the back of the document, appearing in reverse. Stamps are legible through the page.

elements.description: Blue ink stamp reading 'U.S. DEPT OF JUSTICE / FBI / RECEIVED' followed by 'MAY 9 4 54 PM 52'. There is also a faint, upside-down blue ink stamp reading 'MAY 9 3 52 PM 52' and a faint red stamp reading 'MAY 20 1952'.

judge.reason: Description B quotes specific, detailed text from blue and red stamps, while Description A reports the stamps are visible but does not confirm the quoted text, leading to a critical factual inconsistency on verbatim content.
